00.title: Meet Kwami
00.main: Kwami is a single canvas where AI voice, music, and motion stay perfectly in sync.
00.sub: Scroll the story on the left while the blob mirrors every state change on the right.

01.title: Why Kwami
01.main: Ship one expressive companion instead of juggling separate widgets for audio, AI, and visuals.
01.sub: The Playground demo shows how the rotating sidebars keep context tight and fun.

02.title: Quick Start
02.main: Install the package, run the playground, and point Kwami at any canvas.
02.sub: Single-click listens, double-click randomizes—no extra wiring required.

03.title: Architecture
03.main: Mind, Body, and Soul stay decoupled so teams can tweak logic, visuals, or vibe independently.
03.sub: Swap sidebars inside the Playground to feel how each layer plugs in.

04.title: Mind Layer
04.main: Define providers, enter an ElevenLabs key, and spin up conversations with one click.

05.title: Body Layer
05.main: The WebGL blob reacts to FFT data, touch ripples, and pointer gestures in real time.

06.title: Soul Layer
06.main: Ten emotional traits steer prompts, voice tone, and animation states.

07.title: Interaction Flow
07.main: Idle, listening, thinking, and speaking states keep the blob legible at a glance.

08.title: Visual Styles
08.main: Pick gradients, glass, imagery, or videos and keep typography synced with palette shifts.

09.title: Audio & Voice
09.main: Web Audio analysis drives spikes while ElevenLabs handles low-latency speech.

10.title: Provider Architecture
10.main: Every vendor implements the same `connect / speak / listen / dispose` surface.

11.title: Customization & Config
11.main: Adjust spikes, time, skins, rotation, and emotional ranges with type-safe configs.

12.title: Developer Toolkit
12.main: Export GLB models, reuse Nuxt/Bun starters, or drop straight into any SPA.

13.title: Performance & Testing
13.main: 60fps targets, Vitest suites, and strict TS settings keep experiments shippable.

14.title: Use Cases
14.main: From DJ sets to wellness companions, upload any track and watch the blob respond.

15.title: Connected Ecosystem
15.main: Kwami ties into kwami.io, qwami.io, and quami.io so one NFT companion spans Web2/Web3 workflows.

16.title: Ownership & Web3
16.main: Mint a Kwami on Solana and keep the blob's DNA hash synced with live configs.

17.title: Roadmap
17.main: WebXR, multi-character scenes, physics, and plugins are already in flight.

18.title: Learning Path
18.main: Follow the docs from Getting Started to Mind/Body/Soul deep dives within minutes.

19.title: Community
19.main: Share shaders, providers, or docs PRs—everything lives in the open.

20.title: Pro & Enterprise
20.main: Upgrade for white-labeling, premium providers, analytics, and dedicated support.

21.title: Launch Your Companion
21.main: Fork the repo, remix the blob, and drop your own AI companion in minutes.
